name: looply-desktop
description: Looply Desktop - Visual companion for AI-assisted engineering workflows

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:renderer
scripts.postinstall: electron-builder install-app-deps && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Info.plist';if(fs.existsSync(p)){let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');s=s.replace(/<string>Electron<\/string>/g,'<string>Looply</string>');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);}" && cp resources/icon.icns node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns 2>/dev/null || true
